articles.title: UK investigating reports Russian warship fired warning shots near yacht in English Channel
articles.summary: BBC News understands the yacht had drifted towards the Admiral Grigorovich, a Russian frigate which has been operating in the Channel.

articles.title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity
articles.summary: For many Iranians, the question is not whether the deal means victory, but whether it lowers prices and reduces fear of another war.

articles.title: Cuba tourism collapses as US pressure campaign bites
articles.summary: The number of foreign visitors is down by 58% compared to last year, Cuban officials say, amid sanctions and an effective oil blockade.

articles.title: Hungary's MPs block return of Orbán, limiting rule of PM to eight years
articles.summary: The vote fulfils a promise by new PM Péter Magyar to stop his predecessor from becoming prime minister again.

articles.title: 'Dancing girl's' bare torso restored in Indian textbook after backlash
